calendar.matters:
Mtn For Apportionment Proceeding & For Order To Distribute Settlement Funds
Off Calendar Aug-25-2005 Text Ruling

Apportionment Of Settlement Funds.
Off Calendar Aug-25-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion for an Order to Distribute Settlement Funds Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
Julie Grebel, Esq. and Christopher Andreas, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Wilda MalMalbreau, Patgricia Malbreau, present with Sign Interpreter: Nina Gelfant, Linda Malbreau and Geneva Malbreau, also present.
Plaintiff Wilfred Malbreau, Jr., is not present.
After hearing the testimony, reviewed the moving papers and considered the evidence presented, the Court grants Order to Distribute Settlement Funds, fees and costs, and future settlement as fully described in the Order (see scanned doc. for details).

P.M.
Order signed by Comm. Kaplan.
